briefdescription.para: Contains a minimal set of functions for the XVphy driver that allow access to all of the Video PHY core's functionality.

detaileddescription.para: See xvphy.h for a detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.7 gm 13/09/17 Initial release. 1.8 gm 14/05/18 Updated CDR values for DP 05/09/18 Enable IPS only when XVphy_GetRefClkSourcesCount returns more than 1. 1.9 gm 14/05/18 Added CDR_CFG3 configuration for DP
